prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名近年持续上升，2021 年第 51 名→2026 年第 49 名，首次进入前 50，学校综合实力获认可；2023 年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面事件；抖音热度排名第 94 位（一般），短视频曝光量一般；历史投档异常信号为低关注，2023 年曾有考生因分数线波动被录取但反馈满意度较高，整体报考心理平稳；交通运输工程 A+（全国顶尖）、土木工程 A，与该校轨道交通、土木类招生专业高度对应，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等该校优势工科专业社会热度持续 偏高（2024 年电子信息/通信高热推荐、电气工程高热推荐）；土木建筑类社会热度分化观望，但该校土木工程为 A 级学科，仍具竞争力；本省 2026 年考生总数 392000 人，较 2025 年物理类+历史类合计 379582 人增加约 12418 人（+3.3%），物理类估算约 268912 人，较 2025 年物理类 260429 人增加约 8483 人（+3.26%），竞争整体加剧；该校位于四川成都，属西南地区，与广西地理相近，地域偏好正面；近年广西招生计划持续增加 （2021 年 130→2025 年 160→2026 年 164），体现对广西生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次 2025 年基准 12953 名、2026 年计划小幅扩招 2.5%、学校软科排名首次进入前 50 提升吸引力、本省物理类考生增加约 3.26% 加剧竞争，以及优势工科专业社会热度持续偏高等因素；预测最低位次约 13167 名，区间 12667–13667 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category/Science was approximately 7885→9679→8772→35099→12953. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform, there was a major grouping score difference (lowest group at 35099). In 2025, it returned to 12953, with a recent 2-year baseline around 12953. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 130 in 2021, 141 in 2022, 139 in 2023, 147 in 2024, and 160 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 164, a slight expansion of about 2.5% compared to 2025, easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking has been rising in recent years, from 51st in 2021 to 49th in 2026, entering the top 50 for the first time, with the university's comprehensive strength recognized. In 2023, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, with no major negative incidents. Douyin popularity ranking is 94th (average), with average short video exposure. Historical admission anomaly signal is low attention; in 2023, some candidates were admitted due to score fluctuations but reported high satisfaction, overall application psychology stable. Transportation Engineering A+ (top nationally), Civil Engineering A, highly corresponding to the university's rail transit and civil engineering enrollment majors, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other advantageous engineering majors at the university have consistently high social popularity (in 2024, Electronic Information/Communication highly recommended, Electrical Engineering highly recommended). Civil Engineering and Architecture social popularity is divided and wait-and-see, but the university's Civil Engineering is an A-level discipline, still competitive. In 2026, the provincial total number of candidates is 392,000, an increase of about 12,418 (+3.3%) compared to the 2025 total of 379,582 for Physics + History categories. Physics Category is estimated at about 268,912, an increase of about 8,483 (+3.26%) compared to the 2025 Physics Category of 260,429, intensifying overall competition. The university is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, in the southwest region, geographically close to Guangxi, with positive regional preference. In recent years, the Guangxi enrollment plan has been increasing (130 in 2021→160 in 2025→164 in 2026), reflecting emphasis on Guangxi students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking baseline of 12,953 in 2025, a slight 2.5% expansion in the 2026 plan, the university's Soft Science ranking entering the top 50 for the first time enhancing attractiveness, a 3.26% increase in provincial Physics Category candidates intensifying competition, and the consistently high social popularity of advantageous engineering majors, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 13,167, with a range of 12,667–13,667.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Class (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering)
- Electronic Information Class (Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology)
- Transportation Class (Transportation, Traffic Engineering)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Business Administration Class (Information Management and Information Systems, Business Administration, Accounting, Engineering Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 12,667–13,667, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical, Computer, Transportation, etc.) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 12,500), you can focus on Tier 1 advantageous discipline majors. If your ranking is close to the upper bound (e.g., beyond 13,500), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 majors and use Tier 3 majors as a safe backup.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1365→1753→1794→4566→2166. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform, there was a major-group score gap (lowest group ranked 4566). In 2025, it returned to 2166, with a recent 2-year baseline around 2166. Provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plans: 2021: 23, 2022: 17, 2023: 19, 2024: 19, 2025: 17; 2026 plan: 16, a reduction of about 5.9% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking has been rising in recent years, from 51st in 2021 to 49th in 2026, entering the top 50 for the first time, indicating growing recognition of the university's comprehensive strength. In 2023, reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, with no major negative incidents. Douyin popularity ranking: 94th (average), short video exposure is average. Historical admission anomaly signal: low attention, overall application psychology stable. Transportation Engineering A+, Civil Engineering A. Although primarily focused on science and engineering, as a 211 Double First-Class university, its liberal arts programs still offer platform advantages.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law: socially recommended hot; Chinese Language/Literature: recommended; Teacher Training/Education: wait-and-see with differentiation. The university's liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Ideological and Political Education, Public Administration, Foreign Languages and Literatures) are all moderately popular directions in society. In 2026, the province's total number of examinees is 392,000, with history category estimated at about 123,088, an increase of about 3,935 (+3.3%) compared to 2025's 119,153, intensifying overall competition. The university is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, in the southwestern region, geographically close to Guangxi, with positive regional preference. In recent years, Guangxi's history category enrollment plans have slightly decreased (2021: 23→2025: 17→2026: 16), and the reduction in slots intensifies competition.

预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking baseline of 2166 in 2025, a 5.9% reduction in enrollment plan for 2026, the university's Soft Science ranking entering the top 50 for the first time enhancing overall appeal, and a 3.3% increase in provincial history category examinees intensifying competition, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2075, with a range of 1764–2386.
